context.description: Context is a JSON object map in v0.9.

action.description: v0.9 actions should use the `event` wrapper for server-dispatched clicks.

label.description: The label for the group of options.

variant.description: A hint for how the choice picker should be displayed and behave.

label.description: The text to display for this option.

value.description: The stable value associated with this option.

options.description: The list of available options to choose from.

value.description: The list of currently selected values.

displayStyle.description: The display style of the component.

filterable.description: If true, displays a search input to filter the options.

condition.description: The condition that indicates whether the check passes.

message.description: The error message to display if the check fails.

checks.description: A list of checks to perform.

children.description: Static child IDs array or template object.

value.description: The current date/time value. Typically bound to a data path.

label.description: The text label for the input field.

enableDate.description: Whether to show the date picker.

enableTime.description: Whether to show the time picker.

outputFormat.description: Format string for the output value. Supports YYYY, MM, DD, HH, and mm.

condition.description: The condition that indicates whether the check passes.

message.description: The error message to display if the check fails.

checks.description: A list of checks to perform.

name.description: Google Material icon ligature name, e.g. "info", "account_circle", "arrow_back".

labels.description: Category labels shown along the x axis.

series.description: One or more line series to render over the shared labels.

children.description: Static child IDs array or template object.

variant.description: Visual density for the skeleton placeholder.

trigger.description: The ID of the component that opens the modal when interacted with.

content.description: The ID of the component to display inside the modal.

variant.description: Render the chart as a flat pie or a donut.

title.description: Optional title shown above the chart.

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle shown under the title.

showLegend.description: Show the legend below the chart.

showPercentages.description: Show percentage values in the legend.

paddingAngle.description: Padding angle between slices, in degrees.

colors.description: Custom color palette for the slices.

items.description: The list of string options to display.

usageHint.description: A hint for the visual style of the radio group.

children.description: Static child IDs array or template object.

min.description: The minimum value of the slider.

max.description: The maximum value of the slider.

value.description: The current value of the slider.

condition.description: The condition that indicates whether the check passes.

message.description: The error message to display if the check fails.

checks.description: A list of checks to perform.

text.description: Literal text, path binding, or function call.

label.description: The text label for the input field.

value.description: The value of the text field.

variant.description: The type of input field to display.

validationRegexp.description: A regular expression used for client-side validation of the input.

condition.description: The condition that indicates whether the check passes.

message.description: The error message to display if the check fails.

checks.description: A list of checks to perform.
